creator: cdr.nil@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254203
git format-patch

Update to OpenBSD 7.6 version (20241008)

Changes in this relase:

  * Ignore universal ctags extended metadata in tagaddress, making
    search patterns work again
  * Fix auto-indent-mode with custom tab widths
  * Add handling for C-u modifier in M-! and M-|
  * Dired-up-directory bound to ^ to go up a directory in dired buffers

From: https://cvsweb.openbsd.org/src/usr.bin/mg/
